CheckTitle: Cosmos DB account has public network access disabled
Description: **Azure Cosmos DB** accounts are evaluated for **public network access**. Disabling public access ensures the account is only reachable through private endpoints or VNet service endpoints, reducing the attack surface.
Risk: Public network access exposes the database endpoint to the internet. Combined with weak authentication, this enables **unauthorized data access**, **enumeration**, and **brute force** attacks from any source.
